case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. BLAIR WIDDERS et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WIDDERS, BLAIR
ORDER RE EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUSGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WIDDERS, BLAIR DOES 1 -20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIDDERS, BLAIR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1112 D HUTCHINS COURT, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,178.03 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,178.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
